keep.description: Retain the N most-recently-imported tags of each stream.
keep.title: Keep

olderThanDays.description: Of the surplus, only mark tags older than this many days (both conditions hold).
olderThanDays.title: Olderthandays

CACertSource.description: A CA certificate supplied either as a filesystem path or as an inline PEM string.

path.description: Filesystem path to the CA certificate (exactly one of `path` | `pem`).
path.title: Path

pem.description: Inline CA certificate PEM string (exactly one of `path` | `pem`).
pem.title: Pem

CACertSource.title: CACertSource

PackageMirror.description: Override URLs for one or more OS package managers during image hardening.

apt.description: Override URL for the apt package source (at least one of `apt` | `apk`).
apt.title: Apt

apk.description: Override URL for the apk package source (at least one of `apt` | `apk`).
apk.title: Apk

PackageMirror.title: PackageMirror

RegistryConfig.description: One real registry behind a logical destination name (host + credentials).

username.description: Registry username (must be set together with `password`).
username.title: Username

password.description: Registry password (must be set together with `username`).
password.title: Password

tls_verify.description: Set to `false` for plain-HTTP registries; houba then pushes insecurely on both paths — `regctl registry set … --tls disabled` for copies and `registry.insecure=true` for BuildKit rebuilds.
tls_verify.title: Tls Verify

ca_cert.description: Path to a CA PEM regctl should trust for this registry's TLS (registries behind an internal CA).
ca_cert.title: Ca Cert

deletion_mode.description: Destination-level override in the deletion-mode cascade (policy ← destination ← global).

RegistryConfig.title: RegistryConfig

label_prefix.description: Prefix for houba's own provenance annotations; empty ⇒ no houba labels (OCI-standard keys only).
label_prefix.title: Label Prefix

registries.description: JSON map of logical registry name → `RegistryConfig`. At least one is needed to reconcile.
registries.title: Registries

deletion_mode.description: Global baseline of the deletion-mode cascade.

retention.description: Global tier of the retention cascade (a JSON `Archive`); unset ⇒ retention off everywhere.

transform_ca_certs.description: JSON map of name → CA source, resolved by the `injectCA` transform.
transform_ca_certs.title: Transform Ca Certs

transform_package_mirrors.description: JSON map of name → package mirror, resolved by `rewritePackageSources`.
transform_package_mirrors.title: Transform Package Mirrors

sbom_formats.description: SBOM formats syft emits on every placed image (copy and rebuild), as a JSON list. Allowed: spdx-json, cyclonedx-json. Non-empty — the knob chooses which formats, never whether (always-on coverage).
sbom_formats.title: Sbom Formats

max_concurrency.description: Max parallel tag operations per run (`1` = sequential).
max_concurrency.title: Max Concurrency

attest_signer.description: Signing mode for SLSA attestations on the rebuild path; empty ⇒ off.
attest_signer.title: Attest Signer

attest_fulcio_url.description: Keyless CA URL; blank ⇒ public Fulcio.
attest_fulcio_url.title: Attest Fulcio Url

attest_rekor_url.description: Transparency-log URL; blank ⇒ no log entry.
attest_rekor_url.title: Attest Rekor Url

attest_allow_insecure_registry.description: Let cosign use plain-HTTP / self-signed registries (HOUBA_ATTEST_ALLOW_INSECURE_REGISTRY); testing/demo only.
attest_allow_insecure_registry.title: Attest Allow Insecure Registry

usage_oracle_cmd.description: Executable speaking the usage-oracle contract; required to run `houba purge`.
usage_oracle_cmd.title: Usage Oracle Cmd

usage_oracle_timeout.description: Per-query timeout (seconds) for the usage oracle.
usage_oracle_timeout.title: Usage Oracle Timeout

purge_min_idle_days.description: Idle window `houba purge` requires before reaping a marked tag.
purge_min_idle_days.title: Purge Min Idle Days
